package rulecoverage

func PositiveIoutilReadallStillUsed() string {
    ruleID := "ioutil_readall_still_used"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`ioutil.ReadAll` usage when `io.ReadAll` is available (Go 1.16+)"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
